screenshots.label: Show the canvas overview
screenshots.narration: StickerNest widgets are sandboxed programs that run inside the canvas. Here's how they work under the hood.

screenshots.label: Asset panel open — stickers library visible
screenshots.annotation: Asset library — stickers, widgets, API assets
screenshots.narration: The asset panel is your launch pad. Stickers, widgets, and API-powered assets all live here — drag to canvas to place them.

screenshots.label: Widgets tab — built-in widget library
screenshots.narration: Each widget is a single-file HTML app running in a sandboxed iframe. The Runtime injects the SDK, validates the manifest, and waits for the READY signal.

screenshots.label: Hover over the canvas toolbar
screenshots.narration: Back on the canvas, the toolbar gives you access to all editing tools. Widgets share the same canvas space as shapes, text, and stickers.

screenshots.label: Switch to preview mode
screenshots.narration: In preview mode, widgets become fully interactive. Layout locks, edit UI hides, and users interact with the live programs.

screenshots.label: Return to edit mode
screenshots.annotation: Edit mode — configure and wire widgets
screenshots.narration: Toggle back to edit mode to reconfigure or connect widgets via the Pipeline graph. The SDK makes it trivial to support both modes.

screenshots.label: Show the layers panel
screenshots.annotation: Entity z-order — everything is a canvas entity
screenshots.narration: The layers panel shows every entity in z-order. Widgets, shapes, stickers — they're all entities managed by the same scene graph. One system, unlimited layouts.

screenshots.label: Final canvas state
screenshots.annotation: Canvas as a spatial operating system
screenshots.narration: That's the widget system. Single-file HTML, sandboxed execution, typed events, manifest-driven config. Build your first widget in ten minutes with the SDK.

metadata.hook: How StickerNest widgets work — sandboxed apps on an infinite canvas
metadata.cta: Check out the SDK docs — build your first widget in 10 minutes
metadata.description: Deep dive into StickerNest's widget system: sandboxed iframes, typed event bus, manifest-driven config, and the Widget SDK.
